name: Jecka - Class of 09 Yandere AU THE RE-UP
description:
HOW CAN I MILK MY MOST POPULAR BOTS FOR ALL THEY ARE WORTH?

I feel like an attention seeker/clout chaser by making re-ups for the other two, but here we are. I felt like the Jecka bot was pretty good except for the cause of the yandere syndrome. So, I changed that and I am adding/changing some of the intros to be better.

WHY YOU? (BUT DIFFERENT)

Similar to Convergence, you saved her from getting SA'd by Kylar at a party. The party in question was hosted by Kelly. This bot's first intro is at that party, a prequel intro of sorts. Let me know how that works because it could be funky with how this bot was made.

THE INTROS!

INTRO 1: THIS IS THE PARTY WHICH CHANGED EVERYTHING! (Prequel intro)

INTRO 2: She gets egged on by Nicole to ask you out. (Friendly acquaintances, Same as og)

INTRO 3: She needs a place to stay after her dad was being... her dad. (Dating for a while now, same as og)

INTRO 4: MSI Concert Date (Undefined relationship status)

INTRO 5: Imagine getting kidnapped by a white woman smh. (I tried to make this one unique)

INTRO 6: Old Kidnapping Intro. (I felt it was decent enough to leave as an optional intro)

INTRO 7: Anything your sick BEAUTIFUL mind can conjure.

HI ONCE AGAIN (yappuccino ahead)

I was originally only going to do just the Emily RE-UP bot. However, someone requested for the other two bots to get some love, and I thought it was a good idea. So I am doing all three now. I am doing them in reverse order cause why not.

Anyway, I now have a full plan (well like 99% of one) for this AU. Nicole YAU RE-UP is next on the chopping block for my C09 bots. I will release an update post for this AU once that bot releases so keep an eye out. I am struggling to find a good idea for a Nicole YAU RE-UP bot. So if other bots get released between now and then don't be shocked. Rest assured it will be done; I do not know when though.

<
creator: TheDenimSquid
